text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon Teach, quit worryin'! I'll be back to normal
before you know it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's with that heap of carrots? And
there're veggies, meat, and fish piled up too!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm so hungry...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I've gotcha! I can't hold back with all
these ingredients in front of me!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text:
That's the Hishiama I know! You're the best chef
in all of Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are the ingredients... moving?!

text_block_list.name: Ingredients
text_block_list.text: Veggie, veggie. Meeeaaat. Fish, fish, fish...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What the?! The ingredients have merged together
into a monster!

text_block_list.name: Food Monster
text_block_list.text: Graaah! Foooood!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Oh, nooo. We're going to get eaten whole!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Like I'll let myself be eaten by some kind of
ridiculous food monster!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Taste my hammer of justice!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: HISHIAMAAA KICK!

text_block_list.name: Food Monster
text_block_list.text: Fooood?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crick, crick. Crumble...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
For a bunch of ingredients, you sure know how to
cause trouble... Why don't you stew over that!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text:
Nice job, Hishiama! You gave that monster a
taste of its own medicine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now, enjoy your full-course meal! If you've got
any problems, you know who to call!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Hishiama Bike!

text_block_list.name: Hishiama Bike
text_block_list.text: Vroom, vroom!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What was with that dream?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, well. Dunno why, but I'm feelin' great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her pleasant dream, Hishi Amazon's
fatigue is completely wiped away.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where is that disgusting smell comin' from?!
Someone leave garbage out or something?
I will haaave my reveeenge...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: A-A veggie ghost?! Please don't haunt me!

text_block_list.name: Moldy Carrot
text_block_list.text:
I'm an old, rotten carrot, all mushy and dried up.
You abandoned me in the back of the fridge...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Dang it! You completely slipped my mind!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry! I won't leave you behind again, so
please forgive me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It was just a dream... Man, I'm covered in sweat...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The nightmare leaves Hishi Amazon so rattled,
she's unable to get any meaningful rest.
